intro: The island market is a riot of colour and noise. Stalls overflow with goods carried in from a dozen distant regions, things you would never see anywhere else.
title: The Import Bazaar
description: A bustling island bazaar trading in goods from far-off biomes. Browse the imports and take your pick of a curated held-item selection, or move along.

1.label: Browse the imports
1.tooltip: (+) Pick one from a curated held-item selection
1.selected: You weave through the stalls and look over the imported wares...

2.label: Move on
2.selected: You take in the bustle for a moment, then move along.
